title: hledger UI Settings
description: Configuration for the hledger personal finance UI. Edit this file to customize what appears in the sidebar, enable or disable learning features, and configure widgets.

_version.description: Settings format version. Do not change — used for future migrations.

sidebar.description: Controls what appears in the left navigation sidebar.

items.description:
Ordered list of sidebar items. Each entry is either a built-in page ID (string), a special keyword, or an object describing a section header or custom link.

Available built-in IDs:
  dashboard     — Overview of net worth, recent spending, and income
  register      — Full transaction register with search and filter
  accounts      — Account tree with balances
  balancesheet  — Balance sheet report (assets, liabilities, equity)
  pnl           — Profit & Loss / Income Statement (income vs expenses)
  cashflow      — Cash flow statement (money moving in/out of accounts)
  budget        — Budget tracking vs actuals
  portfolio     — Investment portfolio with market values
  vendors       — Vendor list with spending history
  forecast      — Future balance projection based on recurring transactions
  recurring     — Recurring transaction templates
  reconcile     — Bank reconciliation tool
  triage        — Review and categorize uncategorized transactions
  docs          — Document management and CSV import
  mappings      — Import mappings editor (.rules files)
  git           — Transaction history and git diff viewer
  check         — Journal error checker

Special values:
  divider       — Horizontal rule to visually separate groups of items

Object forms:
  { "type": "section", "label": "Reports" }  — Section heading label
  { "type": "custom", "label": "My Link", "icon": "◈", "href": "/my-page" }  — Custom link

label.description: Text to display as the section heading

oneOf.description: Custom sidebar link to any URL

href.description: URL or path to link to

learning.description: Controls educational features — tooltips, guided tours, and explanatory content throughout the UI. Great for people new to personal finance or double-entry accounting.

enabled.description: Show educational content (tooltips, concept explanations, tour prompts). Set to false once you're comfortable with the UI.

level.description:
How much detail to show in explanations.
  beginner     — Plain English descriptions of accounting concepts; avoid jargon
  intermediate — Assumes basic familiarity; shows accounting terminology
  advanced     — Full accounting language; no extra hand-holding

completedTours.description: List of tour IDs that have already been completed and should not be shown again. Managed automatically by the UI.

display.description: Display preferences for amounts, formatting, and visual style.

showCurrencySymbol.description: Show currency symbols ($, £, etc.) next to amounts. Set to false to hide them for a cleaner look.

views.description: UI view preferences — layout choices for individual pages.

register.description:
Display mode for the Register page.
  cards  — Grouped by date, each transaction shows all postings (default)
  table  — Compact single-row-per-transaction table, good for large date ranges
